summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cardiac Solutions AED monitoring dashboard - both backend and frontend testing successful with excellent integration

minor_issues.issue: Protected endpoint returns 403 instead of expected 401 when no auth provided
minor_issues.impact: Very minor - both codes indicate unauthorized access correctly

passed_tests: Dashboard stats endpoint returning correct data structure
Dashboard subscribers endpoint returning subscriber array
Current user endpoint with JWT token
Frontend login page loads with all elements
EKG heart animation visible and functional
Dashboard renders with AED status cards
Dashboard subscriber table with 8 subscriber rows
Logout functionality and redirect to login
Session management and JWT token handling
